data.title: Zulu Network announces former OpenAI artificial intelligence expert Ishant Singh joins its team
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Zulu Network, an AI-focused network, announced that Ishant Singh, a former OpenAI artificial intelligence expert, has joined its team as director of strategic artificial intelligence. His joining may mark Zulu's further bridging of the gap between advanced AI technology and DeFi.
Zulu Network is committed to building a vibrant community and promoting collaboration. Under Ishant's leadership, Zulu will strengthen its educational programs, developer support, and community engagement to lay the foundation for building an ecosystem that benefits all stakeholders.

data.title: Merlin Chain launches 45% annualized MERL half-year regular staking, the first 1,000 addresses can enjoy a 200% seven-day limited reward
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin Layer2 solution Merlin Chain announced the launch of the MERL token staking plan, providing an annualized fixed income of 45%, with a lock-up period of 6 months, and supports claiming income at any time during the period. In addition, the first 1,000 addresses participating in the regular staking (as of June 20) will receive a 7-day limited-time early bird reward with an annualized rate of return (APR) of up to 200%. The early bird reward is expected to be issued on June 21.
It is reported that Merlin Chain has conducted three phases of PoS Prestage staking activities, with a total of 108 million MERL participating in flexible staking. The fixed income plan launched this time will run in parallel with the existing 15% annualized active staking, aiming to provide more options for long-term MERL holders. In the future, Merlin Chain plans to expand the staking mechanism, including introducing staking pools and supporting multi-asset staking to improve network security and participation.

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Propose Cryptocurrency Tax Reform Amid Revenue Projections
data.description:
According to PANews, Wyoming Republican Senator Cynthia Lummis is advocating for amendments to her party's tax and spending bill to reform the U.S. taxation of cryptocurrencies. The proposal includes extending the 'wash sale rule' from securities trading to the cryptocurrency sector, potentially generating billions in tax revenue, while exempting Bitcoin miners from reporting gains and losses. Lummis has submitted the tax reform plan, co-drafted with Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, to Senate Finance Committee Chairman Mike Crapo.

Lummis emphasized the need to address flaws in the current tax system, while Gillibrand expressed concerns about the timing of the legislation. Members of the Finance Committee have consulted with U.S. President Donald Trump regarding the bill, with Louisiana Senator Bill Cassidy noting the President's interest in the 'work account benefits' provision. If passed, the proposal would establish the first systematic tax framework for crypto assets in the United States.

data.title: Trump Media and Technology Group to Launch Cryptocurrency ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump Media Technology Group (DJT.O) said on Thursday that its Truth Social Bitcoin ETF will directly hold Bitcoin and aims to provide investors with stocks that reflect Bitcoin's price performance. According to documents filed with the SEC, Crypto.com will serve as the ETF's exclusive Bitcoin custodian, primary execution agent and liquidity provider. Trump Media Technology Group, which operates Trump's social media Truth Social, said last month that it would raise about $2.5 billion from institutional investors to buy Bitcoin and planned to use the funds to create a vault for the cryptocurrency. Nunes, CEO of Trump Media Technology Group, said at the time: "We regard Bitcoin as the supreme tool for financial freedom, and now Trump Media will make cryptocurrency an important part of our assets." (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump finally gets China’s Xi Jinping on the phone
data.description:
Donald Trump picked up the phone and called Xi Jinping on Thursday, and the Chinese president finally answered. The conversation, reported by Xinhua and confirmed by Beijing’s foreign ministry, was initiated by Trump, who had been pushing for direct talks after weeks of rising trade tension between the US and China. But details of the […]

data.title: Ethereum's weekly active addresses hit a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to unfolded. data, the number of Ethereum weekly active addresses hit a record high. Last week, the number of addresses participating in the Ethereum ecosystem exceeded 17 million, an increase of 16.95% from the previous week.

data.title: As of the end of May, the value of Bitcoin holdings by listed companies was close to $85 billion
data.description: After Trump was elected as the US President, public companies have shown great enthusiasm for holding Bitcoin. According to a Binance research report, as of the end of May, 116 public companies held a total of 809,100 Bitcoins, worth about $85 billion at current prices, a significant increase from the 312,200 Bitcoins held a year ago, and nearly 100,000 Bitcoins have been added since the beginning of April alone. After taking office, Trump actively promoted the development of cryptocurrencies, such as establishing a strategic Bitcoin reserve, and new accounting rules allowed companies to recognize gains from Bitcoin holdings, which also promoted the increase in holdings. In addition, new entrants such as GameStop began to accumulate Bitcoin, but strategy companies still hold the largest share. The report also pointed out that tokenized real-world assets have grown by more than 260% this year to $23 billion. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Silo Pharma to Acquire $1 Million in Bitcoin for Treasury Reserves
data.description: According to PANews, Silo Pharma, Inc., a Nasdaq-listed biopharmaceutical company, has announced its board's approval to purchase $1 million worth of Bitcoin as a treasury reserve asset. Silo's CEO, Eric Weisblum, stated that incorporating Bitcoin into their balance sheet is a strategic move aimed at diversifying assets and including a digital value storage tool with significant growth potential. The acquisition of Bitcoin is intended to hedge against inflation and is expected to help Silo maintain and enhance long-term shareholder value.
